
1. 
  - ![](doubts-img/charge-density.png){#fig-charge-density align=center width=300 alt="charge-density.png"}
2. How did the following expand as such?
  - ![](doubts-img/electric-field-spherical.png){#fig-electric-field-spherical align=center width=300 alt="electric-field-spherical.png"}
3. For $D_{1n} - D_{2n} = \rho_S$, which is identified as 1 and 2 in a given question?
4. 
  - ![](doubts-img/boundary-conditions-electric.png){#fig-boundary-conditions align=center width=300 alt="boundary-conditions.png"}
  - ![](doubts-img/boundary-conditions-electro-magnetism.png){#fig-boundary-conditions-electro-magnetism align=center width=300 alt="boundary-conditions-electro-magnetism.png"}

# t6


1. ![](doubts-img/dc-vs-ac.png){#fig-dc-vs-ac align=center width=300 alt="dc-vs-ac.png"}
2. ![](doubts-img/chapter-7-summary.png){#fig-chapter-7-summary align=center width=300 alt="chapter-7-summary.png"}
  1. Page 70
